name: maimai-mcp
author: antinomie1
description: maimai DX (CN) query library, CLI, and local stdio MCP: Best50, plates, scores, ranking, chart images via Diving-Fish / Lxns. Install: uv tool install maimai-mcp or pip install maimai-mcp; set STATIC_PATH to extracted static assets; run command maimai-mcp.

localizations.name: maimai-mcp
localizations.description: 舞萌 DX 本地查曲/查分/进度与出图 MCP：Best50、牌子、定数表、上分推荐等（水鱼/落雪）。安装：uv tool install maimai-mcp 或 pip install maimai-mcp；设置 STATIC_PATH 指向解压后的 static 资源；启动命令 maimai-mcp。

tools.name: maimai_search
tools.description: Search songs by title, level value (定数), bpm, artist, or charter. Returns JSON list or chart image when one match.

tools.name: maimai_chart
tools.description: Draw chart info for a song id/title/alias. Optional player identity for push calc.

tools.name: maimai_score_line
tools.description: Compute TAP GREAT tolerance for a score line (diff color + song_id + line%).

tools.name: maimai_random
tools.description: Random chart by level/type/color, then draw chart info.

tools.name: maimai_alias_query
tools.description: List aliases for a song name or id.

tools.name: maimai_alias_local_add
tools.description: Add a local-only alias (not remote vote).

tools.name: maimai_update_catalog
tools.description: Refresh music data, aliases, and/or regenerate rating/plate table images.

tools.name: maimai_b50
tools.description: Best50 image/data. params.source: one-shot divingfish/水鱼 or lxns/落雪. AP50: all_perfect=true, Lxns only.

tools.name: maimai_minfo
tools.description: Personal scores for one song (minfo). Use params.source for one-shot 水鱼/落雪.

tools.name: maimai_rise
tools.description: Recommend charts to gain rating (上分). params.source for one-shot prober.

tools.name: maimai_ranking
tools.description: List or search Diving-Fish RA ranking. Use my=true with qq, or name/username.

tools.name: maimai_fortune
tools.description: Daily fortune + jacket for qq or username seed.

tools.name: maimai_mai_what
tools.description: Random song; with rise=true bias toward charts that push rating.

tools.name: maimai_rating_table
tools.description: Level constant table; progress=true draws personal completion.

tools.name: maimai_plate
tools.description: Plate table or progress (e.g. ver=祝 plan=将 mode=progress).

tools.name: maimai_level_progress
tools.description: Progress for a level + plan (e.g. level=14 plan=ap).

tools.name: maimai_score_list
tools.description: Personal score list for a level or constant (e.g. 14.0).

tools.name: maimai_lookup_song
tools.description: Resolve a title/alias: search then draw chart; optional with_minfo for personal scores.

tools.name: maimai_player_overview
tools.description: Compose b50 image/data with optional rise recommendation JSON.

tools.name: maimai_push_plan
tools.description: Recommend rating gains and draw the first recommended chart.

tools.name: maimai_plate_status
tools.description: Plate progress/table (thin alias of maimai_plate for agent discoverability).

tools.name: maimai_user_show
tools.description: Show theme/service/Import-Token bind status for a player QQ (must pass qq).

tools.name: maimai_user_set_theme
tools.description: Set theme: circle (default) or prism_plus. Stored per QQ in user.db.

tools.name: maimai_user_set_source
tools.description: Set Diving-Fish or Lxns as default score source for a QQ.

tools.name: maimai_user_bind_lxns
tools.description: Get Lxns authorize URL, or submit code to finish binding.

tools.name: maimai_user_bind_import_token
tools.description: Bind player QQ to a Diving-Fish score Import-Token (stored in user.db). Not the developer DIVINGFISH_TOKEN.

tools.name: maimai_update_records
tools.description: QR login → dump → convert → upload. params.source required: divingfish | lxns | both.

tools.name: maimai_refresh_identity
tools.description: Pull friend list, groups, and group members via NapCat HTTP API. Requires NAPCAT_BASE_URL.

tools.name: maimai_identity_status
tools.description: Show identity cache path, stats, and configured NapCat base URL.

tools.name: maimai_resolve_qq
tools.description: Lookup player QQ from identity cache (nickname / card / waterfish name).

tools.name: maimai_get_qq_identity
tools.description: Read nickname / group card for a QQ from identity cache if present.

tools.name: maimai_group_rating_rank
tools.description: 本群 Rating 榜。查榜时按需拉分，新鲜缓存复用；名册来自身份缓存。

tools.name: maimai_group_song_rank
tools.description: 本群单曲榜。查榜时按成员拉该曲成绩，缓存复用。需 group_id + song。

tools.name: maimai_group_member_rank
tools.description: 某人在本群 Rating 或某曲的名次；查榜时按需构建整榜。

tools.name: maimai_player_cache_status
tools.description: 本地成绩缓存覆盖统计（无网络）。
